content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Debugging for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with elusive bugs. Learn how to master Claude Code skills setup with Antigravity to ship faster, impress clients, and automate your debugging.
content.answer_block: To eliminate debugging bottlenecks, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to create a recursive feedback loop. By defining custom skill sets—specifically for stack traces and dependency analysis—you turn your terminal into an autonomous engineering partner that identifies, patches, and verifies code fixes in seconds, not hours.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and you are staring at a cryptic stack trace that refuses to yield. You have been down this rabbit hole for three hours, and the professional facade of your freelance business is beginning to crack under the pressure of unoptimized code. Debugging isn't just a task; it is the silent profit-killer in every solo developer's workflow.

But what if your terminal didn't just display errors, but actively hunted them down? By mastering the Claude Code skills setup, you move from manual 'print-statement' debugging to high-velocity AI-assisted resolution. This guide provides the tactical blueprint to transform your environment into a high-performance debugging machine, allowing you to ship features with the confidence of a ten-person engineering team.

steps.title: Environment Audit with Antigravity
steps.description: Before patching, gain total visibility into your dependency tree to ensure the bug isn't a symptom of version mismatch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory, map all external dependencies, and identify potential version conflicts or deprecated packages that might be causing runtime instability.

steps.title: Initialize Claude Code Context
steps.description: Establish a baseline for your project so Claude understands your architecture, naming conventions, and coding style.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive project architectural summary that Claude Code can use as a system prompt to maintain consistency during refactoring.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Pipe your error logs directly into the engine to pinpoint the exact line of failure without manual searching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the following stack trace and map it to the corresponding file structure, highlighting the root cause and suggesting three potential fix strategies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask "Analyze the latest log file in /logs/error.log and identify the root cause of the current crash."

steps.title: Iterative Patching and Validation
steps.description: Execute the fix and run an automated test suite to verify the resolution without side effects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a unit test that specifically targets the identified bug, run it to confirm failure, then apply the proposed fix and verify the test passes.

steps.title: Final Performance Verification
steps.description: Ensure the fix didn't introduce latency or memory leaks by performing a final stress test.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a performance audit on the modified module. Compare current execution time against previous benchmarks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask "Verify performance impact of the latest commit and ensure no memory leaks were introduced."

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated 'debug-branch' when applying AI-generated fixes to keep your main branch pristine.
Inject your style guide into the Claude Code configuration file to prevent the AI from refactoring code into patterns you find unreadable.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative test cases'—tests specifically designed to break your new code—to ensure your fixes are robust.
Maintain a 'context-summary.md' file in your root; Claude Code uses this to maintain long-term memory across complex debugging sessions.
When facing intermittent bugs, set Claude Code to 'verbose-logging' mode to catch the hidden state changes that standard logs miss.
content.next_steps: After mastering this workflow, integrate these debugging steps into your CI/CD pipeline to catch errors before they even reach your local environment.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting billable hours on manual debugging and start delivering production-grade software at lightning speed. Your clients pay for results, not your time spent hunting syntax errors. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
